grade_6_math:ratios.reason: Ratios compare quantities; they need number sense and fraction/part-whole ideas.

grade_6_math:rates.reason: Unit rates and comparing rates extend ratio reasoning.

grade_6_math:dividing_fractions.reason: Dividing fractions needs fraction meaning and prior fraction operations.

grade_6_math:decimal_arithmetic.reason: Decimal arithmetic needs place value and whole-number operations.

grade_6_math:percents.reason: Percents relate ratios to fractions and decimals.

grade_6_math:common_factors_and_common_m.reason: Factors and multiples are built from whole-number multiplication.

grade_6_math:negative_numbers_and_absolu.reason: Signed numbers extend the number line beyond whole numbers.

grade_6_math:coordinate_plane.reason: All four quadrants require understanding signed numbers.

grade_6_math:numeric_expressions_exponen.reason: Numeric expressions and order of operations assume arithmetic fluency.

grade_6_math:variables_and_algebraic_exp.reason: Algebraic expressions build on numeric expressions and order of operations.

grade_6_math:equivalent_expressions.reason: Combining like terms and the distributive property assume algebraic expressions.

grade_6_math:equations.reason: Solving equations requires writing and evaluating expressions.

grade_6_math:inequalities.reason: Inequalities extend equation reasoning and number-line comparisons.

grade_6_math:equations_as_relationships_.reason: Two-variable relationships combine equation solving with constant rates/ratios.

grade_6_math:polygons.reason: Area formulas use numeric expressions and multiplication.

grade_6_math:polyhedra.reason: Solid figures extend plane-figure area ideas to volume and surface area.

grade_6_math:area_and_volume_with_fracti.reason: Fractional side lengths need fraction operations and area/volume formulas.

grade_6_math:data_sets_and_distributions.reason: Reading and summarizing data needs number sense and basic operations.
